calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Discovery Motion To Deem Admitted Unanswered Request For Admission And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendant Chris Norris' Amended Notice Of Discovery Motion To Deem Admitted Unanswered Request For Admission And For Sanctions is off calendar. An offer to compromise and acceptance was executed by both parties and filed on March 29, 2018.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion (Discovery) To Deem Admitted Unanswered Requests, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; DEFENDANT CHRIS NORRIS' Motion (Discovery) To Deem Admitted Unanswered Requests, And For Sanctions is off calendar. Offer To Compromise and Acceptance, executed by both parties, filed on March 29, 2018. Accordingly, this hearing is vacated. Judge: David M. Hellbraun; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (D302).

Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Continued To Jul-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joong Y. Im, Esq. 415-775-9854 specially appearing for Defendant.
No other Apperance.

RULING - The matter is Unopposed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRIS NORRIS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Defendant Chris Norris' motion to quash service of summons is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
